reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content:
동결건조 형태로 급여하기 너무 쉽고
아이도 빠삭빠삭하니 너무 맛있게 잘먹어요! 
맘마 먹을때 토핑으로 주면 입맛을 돋구어 주는지 밥도 더 잘먹고 살찔걱정 없는 건강 간식이라 부담없이 줄 수 있어 굳굳 입니다!!
reviews.content_en: It's so easy to serve in freeze-dried form, and my pup loves it so much with that crispy texture! When I sprinkle it as a topping on meals, it seems to boost their appetite and they eat even better. Since it's a healthy treat with no weight gain concerns, I can give it without worry. Highly recommend!!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
평소 치즈를 너무너무 좋아해서 특식 먹는 날이면 치즈를 꼭 올려주곤 하는데 이번에 동결건조치즈 간식이 나와서 한 번 급여해봤어요! 일단 너무 잘 먹는건 기본이고, 리틀코티지는 유산균까지 함께 챙길 수 있는게 큰 장점인 것 같아요!! 거기다 색도 알록달록하고.. 밥꾸 좋아하는 견주는 밥꾸며 줄 맛이 나서 좋네요,,,😋

+ 며칠 급여해 본 결과 똥이 더 건강해진 것 같기도…(?)
reviews.content_en:
My pup absolutely loves cheese, so I always add it on special treat days. When I heard BITE ME came out with freeze-dried cheese treats, I had to try it! Of course they eat it really well, and LITTLE COTTAGE has the added benefit of including probiotics!! Plus the colors are so colorful and vibrant... dog parents who love food photography will love how it looks! 😋

+ After feeding it for a few days, their poop seems healthier too…(?)

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 메가주에서 샘플로 받았었는데 잘 먹어서 구매했어요! 실리콘 팟도 메가주에서 구매했었지만 하나 더 구매했습니다 고기 아니면 잘 안먹는 친군데 이거는 잘 먹네요
reviews.content_en: I got a sample from Mega Zoo and my pup ate it so well that I bought it! I had already purchased a silicone pot from Mega Zoo, but I ended up buying another one. My pup doesn't eat much besides meat, but they really enjoy this!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
냠냠 너무 맛있게 잘먹어용 ㅎㅎ
처음 먹는 간식인데도 거부감없이 아기새처럼 잘받아먹네용
reviews.content_en:
Yum yum, eats it so deliciously hehe
Even though it's their first time trying this treat, they don't hesitate and gobble it up like a baby bird!

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
밥꾸템으로 더 할 나위 없이 이뻐요
그리고 강아지도 너무 잘먹어요.
reviews.content_en:
Perfect for food photography!
And my dog really loves it too.

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content:
생각했던 것 보다 단단하고 작아요.
밥에 두개 올려서 주는데 잘 먹어요~
무엇보다 성분 좋고 색상이 4가지라 더 좋아요~
reviews.content_en:
It's harder and smaller than I expected.
I put two on top of their kibble and they eat it well~
Best of all, great ingredients and 4 different colors, so even better~

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 강아지가 잘먹어요, 밥꾸템으로 샀어용
reviews.content_en: My dog eats it well, bought it for food photography!

reviews.name: 인****
reviews.content: 유산균치즈 동결건조는 새로워서 구매해봤어요 ! 실리콘팟도 같이 저렴하게 구매 할 수 있어서 바로 다 질렀습니다 ㅎㅎ 생긴게 꽃모양이라 밥꾸 할 때 쓰면 딱일거같아요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 프불,비숑 두마리 다 기호성 좋네요 ㅎㅎ추천 추천 !! 실리콘 팟 갖고싶었는데 이번 기회에 밥꾸템이 하나 더 늘어서 좋아요 ^_^
reviews.content_en: I bought freeze-dried probiotic cheese because it was something new! I was able to get a silicone pot at a really cheap price too, so I just went ahead and got everything haha The flower shape is perfect for food photography! Both my Poodle and Bichon are really into it hehe Highly recommend! I've been wanting a silicone pot and now my food photography collection has grown, so I'm really happy ^_^

reviews.name: 재****
reviews.content:
리틀 코티지 유산균치즈 궁금했는데 봄이가 너무 잘먹어요,,🤍
밥꾸할때도 너무 좋고 귀여워요 !
앞으로 밥꾸할때 필수템이 될 것 같은 느낌이 드네요 :)
reviews.content_en:
I was curious about LITTLE COTTAGE probiotic cheese and Bomi loves it so much,,🤍
It's so pretty and adorable for food photography!
I have a feeling this will become an essential item for food photography going forward :)

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
성분도 좋고 기호성도 좋아요.
입짧은 강쥐 밥위에 토핑으로 올려줬는데 입맛이 돌았는지 순삭했어요.
reviews.content_en:
Great ingredients and great palatability.
I put it as a topping on my picky eater's kibble and they wolfed it down.

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content:
괜찮은 간식 같아서 구매했는데 잘 먹어요! 
귀엽기도 하고 일석이조입니다 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en:
Seemed like a decent treat so I bought it, and they eat it well!
It's also cute, so it's killing two birds with one stone hehe

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
저희 강아지가 고기만큼이나 좋아하는 간식이 치즈인데 바잇미에서 치즈간식이..🤍
뚜껑 여는 소리 들리면 바로 달려와서 달라고 보챕니다 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ

꽃모양 너무 귀엽고 색도 예뻐요!!
지방도 낮아서 노즈워크 간식으로도 좋고 저처럼 산책 후 직접 만든 수제아이스크림 위에 토핑으로도 최고입니댜👍

특히 유산균 겸용으로도 먹일 수 있어서 너무 좋아요!! 성분도 좋아서 앞으로도 자주 먹일 간식><😁 

리틀코티지 간식 왕추천합니댜..🫰바잇미 사랑훼..😍
reviews.content_en:
My dog loves cheese just as much as meat, and BITE ME came out with a cheese treat..🤍
When they hear the lid opening, they immediately run over and beg for it hahaha

The flower shape is so cute and the colors are so pretty!!
Since the fat is low, it's great for nose work treats, and it's perfect as a topping on homemade dog ice cream after walks like I make👍

Especially being able to feed it as a probiotic supplement is amazing!! The ingredients are so good that I'll definitely keep feeding it><😁

Highly recommend LITTLE COTTAGE treats..🫰 Love BITE ME..😍

reviews.content:
꽃모양으로 딸기&블루베리🩷 단호박&브로콜리💛 알록달록 귀여워요
유산균은 가루형태로만 급여했었는데 트릿형식으로 매일 간식처럼 급여할수 있어 최고에요! 음수량 부족한 댕친구들은 물에 녹여줘도 잘먹을거같아요!! 장건강과 뼈,치아를 위해 리틀코티지 합시당!!

급여하는 Tip❤️
- 트릿 그대로 간식처럼 부담없이 급여
- 음수량 채워야하는 댕이들은 물에녹여 급여
- 사료토핑으로도 최고✌🏻

너무 잘먹어서 간식처럼 맛별로 하루4알 급여중이에요
인공첨가물이 없어 건강한간식! 개봉하면 꼭 냉장보관해주세욤!!
reviews.content_en:
Flower shapes with strawberry & blueberry🩷 sweet pumpkin & broccoli💛 so cute and colorful!
I've only given probiotics in powder form before, but now I can give it daily as a treat in treat form - that's amazing! Dogs that don't drink enough water might also do well if you dissolve it in water!! For gut health and bones and teeth, let's go with LITTLE COTTAGE!!

Feeding Tips❤️
- Give as-is as a casual treat
- For dogs that need more water intake, dissolve in water and serve
- Also perfect as kibble topping✌🏻

They eat it so well that I'm giving 4 pieces a day like a regular treat by flavor
No artificial additives so it's a healthy treat! Please refrigerate immediately after opening!

reviews.name: 방****
reviews.content:
10살 포메, 6살 삽살이 1살 진도를 키우면서 세마리의
강아지 기호를 맞추기 쉽지 않는데,고기간식도 아닌데 아이들이 이렇게 잘먹는 간식은..처음입니다👍👍
(둘째는 너무 맛있어서 침을…🤤)
첫째는 나이도 있고 조심해야될게 많은데 고단백, 저지방, 저염, 저칼로리까지 찰떡이더라고요!!!
둘째와 셋째는 장이 약해서 수시로 병원방문하면서 유산균도 같이 먹습니다! 3일동안 먹는데…강아지가 똥을 싸는게 엄청 편해졌어요!!하루에 한번 싸는 똥도 2번씩 편안하게 싸는걸 보니…정말 강추입니다!!!👍👍👍
reviews.content_en:
Raising a 10-year-old Pomeranian, 6-year-old Shih Tzu, and 1-year-old Jindo, it's not easy to satisfy all three dogs' tastes, but this isn't even a meat treat and they eat it so well - this is a first for me!👍👍
(The second one was so delicious they were drooling…🤤)
The oldest needs extra care due to age, and it's perfect with high protein, low fat, low sodium, and low calories!!!
The second and third have sensitive stomachs and visit the vet often while taking probiotics! After eating for 3 days... my dogs' bowel movements became so much better!! I used to see them poop once a day, but now they poop twice comfortably. I really highly recommend it!!!👍👍👍

reviews.name: 예****
reviews.content:
택배오자마자 자기꺼는 기가막히게 아는 저희집 먼뚱이 :-)
바잇미에서 새로 출시된 유산균 동결건조 치즈 먹여 보았눙데여 포장 뜯자마자 얼마나 난리가 나던지,, 냄새만 맡아도 기호성이 최곤가봐요!! 식이알러지가 있어서 아무거나 먹이지 못하는데 요 제품은 성분도 좋고 무엇보다 밥꾸템 강추 제품입니다 색깔이며 모양이며 너무 좋잖아요?! 저는 물간식으로 리틀코티지 올려서 음수량 채워줘요🩵 집사님들 치킨값 아껴서 댕댕이 좋은거 먹이자구요!
reviews.content_en:
As soon as the package arrived, my Meontung (who somehow knows which treat is theirs) 😊
I tried BITE ME's newly released freeze-dried probiotic cheese treat and as soon as I opened the package, it was absolute chaos,, just from smelling it, the palatability is incredible!! My pup has food allergies so I can't feed just anything, but this product has great ingredients and most importantly, it's a must-have for food photography. The colors and shape are just so good?! I use LITTLE COTTAGE as a water treat with water to boost their water intake🩵 Dog parents, save that chicken money and feed your pup quality treats!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
치즈간식은 처음이지만 너무 잘 먹어요!!!
마음이 급해서 세트로 사면 실리콘팟 엄청 싸게 살 수 있는걸 몰랐어요 흑흑
메론색으로 또 주문할라구요~~~
처음에 걱정돼서 제가 직접 한입 먹어봤는데 저는 이에 좀 붙더라구요ㅜㅜ
그래서 손으로 톡 쪼개서 줘보니 처음엔 이랑 혀에 붙는 가벼운 간식이라 어색해하더니만 금새 오도독오도독 잘 먹어서 기분 좋았답니다ㅎㅎㅎ
강아지 유산균 알아보던 차에 간식으로 줄 수 있는 예쁜모양 치즈, 밥꾸 별 거 있나요? 
그냥 밥그릇에 올리면 끝~ 
진짜 밥꾸템 단골 예약이에요~
reviews.content_en:
First time trying a cheese treat but they eat it so well!!!
I was in a rush and didn't realize you could get the silicone pot so cheap with a set purchase, oh no!
I'm about to reorder in the melon color~~~
I was worried at first so I tried a piece myself, but it did stick to my teeth a bit for me hehe
So I broke it up by hand and gave it to them, and at first they found it strange since it's a light treat that sticks to teeth and tongue, but soon they were crunching away happily hehe
When I was looking into dog probiotics, why not a pretty flower-shaped cheese treat for food photography?
Just put it in the bowl and you're done~
This is definitely going to be a regular staple for food photography for me~

reviews.name: 구****
reviews.content:
기호도가 너무 좋아서 새로 사준 간식인데도 울집 러블리 뜨리멍이가 모두 관심 갖고 잘먹었어요🩵 향, 맛도 그렇고 식감도 거부감 없어서 아이들이 너무 잘 먹습니다. 
패키지도 귀여워서 뭔가 간식 줄 때마다 귀여운 인증샷 하나씩 잘 건질수 있어용 !! 
유산균 따로 먹이는 거 힘든데  간식으로 먹일 수 있어서 좋습니당 😉
reviews.content_en:
The palatability is so good that even though it was a new treat I bought, all three of my pups were interested and ate it well🩵 The smell and taste are great, and the texture is accepted without hesitation, so the kids really enjoy it.
The packaging is also so cute that I get to take an adorable photo every time I give them a treat!!
It's hard to give probiotics separately, so being able to give it as a treat is great😉

reviews.name: 심****
reviews.content:
모양도 색깔도 예쁜 동결건조 치즈간식이에요 ㅎㅎ
두가지 종류 모두 기호성 너무 좋아요.
제일 중요한! 변 상태도 좋았습니다.

용기가 작아서 산책시 가지고 다니면서
트릿으로 간편하게 급여가능하고
식사 토핑용으로도 좋은 특별하고 유용한 간식입니다^^
reviews.content_en:
Pretty flower-shaped freeze-dried cheese treat hehe
Both types have excellent palatability.
Most importantly! Their poop looked great.

The container is small so I can take it on walks and give it conveniently as a treat,
It's a special and useful treat that's also great as a meal topping^^

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
바삭바삭한지 입맛까다로운 우리 애기가 너무 잘먹고 좋아해여 동결건조리코타치즈는 처음인데 대대만족입니당
 지금 다이어트 중인데 칼로리가 낮아서 너무 좋아요
꽃모양이라서 이쁘기도 ..❤️ 
제일 마음에 드는 건 물에 섞어서 물간식으로 줄 수 있는거 !
내 새끼 음수량은 내가 책임진다!!
reviews.content_en:
They're so crispy, my picky eater pup loves it, and I was surprised at how well they eat it! The freeze-dried ricotta cheese is my first time trying and I'm very satisfied
I'm currently on a diet and the low calories are perfect!
And the flower shape is pretty too❤️
What I love most is being able to mix it with water and give it as a water treat!
I'll make sure my pup stays hydrated!!

reviews.name: 단****
reviews.content:
비숑 페키 두마리중 페키니즈는 유산균을 먹이면 묽은변을 보는 것 같아 유산균 안주고있었어요 그러다 동결건조 치즈유산균이 바잇미에 나왔길래 한번 믿구 먹여보자! 하고 겟 ❤️
아침한알 저녁한알 주는데 기호성은 물론 설사도 없고 배에 꾸르륵 소리도 안나요.. 예쁜응가는 덤.. 🐻
치즈맛이 나서 그런가 두마리 모두가 뚜껑 여는 소리만 들려도 둘다 자다말고 뛰어나와요 기호성좋은 건강한 리틀코티지 유산균 🫶🏼 또 시킬게요 감사합니다 잘 먹일게요!
reviews.content_en:
Out of my two Bichon and Pekingese, the Pekingese seemed to have loose stools when given probiotics, so I wasn't giving them any. Then BITE ME came out with freeze-dried cheese probiotics, so I decided to give it a try! ❤️
I give one in the morning and one in the evening, and not only is the palatability great, there's no diarrhea and no stomach gurgling.. plus beautiful poops as a bonus.. 🐻
Since it tastes like cheese, both dogs jump up the moment they hear the lid opening even when sleeping. Great palatability and healthy LITTLE COTTAGE probiotics 🫶🏼 I'll order again. Thank you and I'll feed it well!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
체험단으로 리틀코티지 유산균치즈 2종을 먹어봤어요
치즈간식이라 처음 뜯었을때 시콤새콤한 향이 나는데 뚜비는 냄새를 맡자마자 침샘폭발💦 침줄줄🤤
기호성은 너어어어무 좋아서 아삭아삭 소리내면서 맛있게 잘먹더라구요!! 
사료토핑으로 올려 귀여우면서 영양가 있는 밥을 주게되니 기부니가 좋더라구요😋 
치즈간식은 앞으로 바잇미 리틀코티지치즈 너로 정했다😎
reviews.content_en:
I tried LITTLE COTTAGE probiotic cheese 2 types as a reviewer
Since it's a cheese treat, when I first opened it there was a tangy sour smell, and Tubi's eyes went wide with saliva flowing💦🤤
The palatability is amazingly good, they ate it crunching away so deliciously!!
Using it as a kibble topper to make cute and nutritious meals made me so happy😋
I've decided cheese treats from now on will be BITE ME LITTLE COTTAGE cheese😎

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
5키로 말티즈 흉통이 큰편이고 다리가 길쭉 길쭉한 아이입니다! 

사이즈는 상의는 L / 모자는 M 사이즈 구매했는데 딱 잘 맞습니다!! 

디자인 너무 귀엽고, 통기서 너무 좋고, 신축성도 쫜쫜하고 아주 좋습니다.

포차코 콜라보라고 해서 콜라보 전제품 구매해 버렸습니다 ... !

귀여운거옆에 귀여운거라니 이보다 좋은수가 없네요~~완전 베리굿 입니다요!!

5.6kg 둘찌 고양이에겐 좀 타이트 합니다!
물론 첫찌 멈뭉이가 입을거지만 제질이 좋아 고양이도 함께 입혀 보았습니다 ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en:
Our 5kg Maltese Heungtong has a wide chest and long thin legs!

I bought size L for the top and M for the hat, and it fits perfectly!!

The design is so cute, the breathability is great, and the elasticity is stretchy and excellent.

Since it's a Pororo collaboration, I ended up buying all the collab products...!

Cute next to cute, there's nothing better~~it's absolutely great!!

Our 5.6kg second cat finds it a bit tight!
Of course the first one will wear it, but since the material is good, I tried it on the cat too haha

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
칼로리에 예민한 저는 칼로리도 적고, 기호성도 너무 좋았어요💙⭐️ 
예쁜 꽃 모양으로 밥꾸할 때도 부담 없이 예쁘게 줄 수 있었고, 원형 통 안에 들어있어 보관도 너무 좋아요 🙊💡

베지, 푸룻으로 구성되어 있어 영양 챙기기에도 좋았구 전 항상 애기들 먹이기 전에 제가 먼저 먹어보는데, 제가 먹어도 맛있었어요 !!!
reviews.content_en:
I'm sensitive to calories and these have low calories with excellent palatability💙⭐️
With the pretty flower shape, I can give them without worry for food photography, and they come in a round container which is super easy to store🙊💡

With veggies and fruit, it's great for nutrition too, and I always taste test what I feed my pups first, and these actually taste good!!!

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
바잇미 리틀코티즈치즈🌼
일단 모양이 귀여워서 밥꾸하기에 좋고 기호성도 좋아요!
식감은 파사삭 부서지는 느낌이라서 야무지게 잘 씹어먹는답니다
유산균까지 들어있어서 끙아도 더 예뻐지길 기대해볼게오✨
reviews.content_en:
BITE ME LITTLE COTTAGE Cheese🌼
First, the shape is cute so it's perfect for food photography and the palatability is great!
The texture crumbles apart nicely so they chew it thoroughly
With probiotics included, I'm hopeful their poops become even prettier✨

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
댕댕이 밥꾸할때 유용해요!! 요거 하나만 올려줘도 맘마 분위기가 달라져요
살짝 부셔서 물위에 뿌려주면 음수량 채우기도 좋더라구요

기호성 좋고 성분도 좋고 너무 귀엽게 생겨서 다 먹이면 또 구매할 것 같아요👌🏻
reviews.content_en:
Great for food photography! Just putting one on top changes the whole vibe of mealtime
If you crumble it slightly and sprinkle it on water, it also helps them drink more water

Great palatability, great ingredients, and so cute looking - I'll probably buy again once it's gone👌🏻

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 입맛 까다로운 즤집 강아지가 밥 그릇 놓자말자 이거 먼저 먹네요! 밥 투정하는 강아지들에게도 좋을거같아요 잘 먹고 바삭바삭 먹는소리 식감도 너무 재밌어요 ㅎㅎ 밥꾸에 진심인 보호자도 모양이며 색깔이며 귀영워서 기절~
reviews.content_en: My picky eater pup digs into this first before anything else when the bowl hits the ground! It might be good for dogs that are picky about food too. They eat so well and the crispy crunching sound is so fun to listen to hehe The guardian who takes food photography seriously is also like 'pass out' at how cute the shape and colors are~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
치즈는 처음 먹여봤는데 너무 잘먹어서 놀랐어요! 오독오독 바사삭 잘 씹어먹고 작은 사이즈라 고양이들도 잘먹는 것 같아요👏🏻
유산균 따로 먹이지 않아도 이거 하나로 해결가능해서 편하고 밥꾸용으로도 딱이네요🌸 손으로도 잘쪼개자고 부스러지니까 물에 타줘도 딱입니당
reviews.content_en:
It was my first time giving them cheese and I was surprised at how well they ate it! They crunch crunch crunch away and the small size means even cats eat it well👏🏻
Since probiotics are all-in-one with this, it's convenient without having to give them separately, and it's perfect for food photography🌸 It crumbles easily when you break it by hand or dissolve it in water too!

reviews.name: 하****
reviews.content:
🧀🌸바잇미 리틀코티지 유산균치즈🌸🧀
좋은 기회로 체험단에 선정되어 아이들이 좋아하는 치즈+유산균 합 급여해봤습니다~~
저희는 주로 밥꾸템으로 유산균으로 급여했어요!
물간식으로 줘도 너무너무 잘먹는데
밥꾸가 취미인 엄마는 밥주면서 행복했지 모에요ㅎㅎㅎ
3둥이 13살 할배, 8살 아재, 1살 반 막내까지
모두모두 기호성 최강!!!
사르르 부셔져서 가루 토핑으로도 잘먹는데
너무 예뻐서 부수기 아숩🥲

기호성 최강에, 유산균으로 장건강까지 챙길 수 있는
리틀 코티지 유산균치즈 추천합니다🫸🏻🫷🏻🤍🤜🏻🤛🏻❤️👍🏻
reviews.content_en:
🧀🌸BITE ME LITTLE COTTAGE Probiotic Cheese🌸🧀
I was selected as a reviewer and got to feed my pups their favorite cheese + probiotics combined~~
We mainly used it for food photography with probiotics!
They eat it so so well even as a water treat, but
as a mom who loves food photography, I was happy just serving meals hehe
From our 13-year-old grandpa triplet, 8-year-old middle child, to 1.5-year-old maknae
All of them LOVE the palatability!!!
It crumbles softly so it works as powder topping too, but
it's so pretty I'm reluctant to crumble it 🥲

Excellent palatability and supports gut health with probiotics,
I recommend LITTLE COTTAGE probiotic cheese🫸🏻🫷🏻🤍🤜🏻🤛🏻❤️👍🏻

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content:
우리집 멍뭉이 new 밥꾸템!
바잇미 신상 리틀코티지 유산균치즈 🧀 

두가지 종류로 너무 귀요운데 맛까지 좋은지 엄청 잘 먹어요!

유산균 치즈 트릿인만큼 장건강에도 도움이 될것 같고 
밥꾸 뿐만 아니라 칭찬 간식으로도 좋을것 같아요~!!
reviews.content_en:
My pup's new food photography staple!
BITE ME's new LITTLE COTTAGE probiotic cheese 🧀

Two types and so adorable, plus the taste is great - they eat it so much!

Since it's a probiotic cheese treat, it seems to help with gut health
and it seems great not just for food photography but also as praise treats~!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
유산균인데 안에 코티지치즈가 들어있어서
기호성이 정말 좋았어요.
꽃모양트릿이라서 모양도 귀엽구용

급여방법도 그냥 그대로 줘도 되고,
사료 토핑으로 줘도되고, 물에 띄워주면 음수량도
채울 수 있어 편하게 급여 가능했습니다.

양도 넉넉한데 가성비도 좋아요 ~ !
reviews.content_en:
It's probiotics but with cottage cheese inside,
so the palatability was really great.
Flower-shaped treats so the shape is cute too

You can give it as-is,
use it as kibble topping, or float it in water to boost water intake -
so it's convenient to feed in various ways.

The portion is generous and the value is great too~!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 바삭바삭한 식감이라 너무 잘 먹어요. 치즈간식들은 꼬릿한 냄새때문에 별론데, 바잇미 리틀 코티지는 냄새도 많이 강하지 않아서 거부감없이 잘 먹더라구요. 가루날림도 없고 가볍게 챙겨주기 너무 좋아요.
reviews.content_en: The texture is so crispy that my pup loves it! I'm not usually a fan of cheese treats because of that strong smell, but BITE ME Little Cottage doesn't have a very strong odor, so my dog eats it without any hesitation. There's no powder mess either, and it's super convenient to give as a quick snack.

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
이번에 새로 출시된 리틀 코티지 먹여봤는데요!
일단 냄새는 진짜 코티지 치즈청룸 살짝 시큼하고 쿰쿰한 냄새가 났고 트릿형태라 소형견인 저희 강아지한테 딱 알맞은 크기라 먹이기 좋았어요! 무엇보다 유산균이 들어있어서 겸용으로 주기에도 부담없어요!  밥꾸템으로 포인트 주기 좋아서 자주 사용할 것 같습니당 ;)
reviews.content_en:
I just tried the newly released Little Cottage!
First off, it smells just like cottage cheese—a bit tangy and a little funky—and since it's treat-sized, it's the perfect size for my small dog to eat! Plus, it has probiotics in it, so I can give it without any guilt as a supplement too! It's great as a rice bowl topper, so I think I'll be using it a lot ;)

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content:
넘모 애쁜 밥꾸템 추가댓어여!! 알록달록 꽃모양 🌸🌼
유산균은 필수인거아시죠 ~ ? 
치즈로 유산균도 챙기고 너무 맛있을거같은 냄새까지 ,, 
가루가 잘 생겨서 음수량 채워주기도 딱 좋아요 💪🏼
reviews.content_en:
Such a cute rice bowl topper addition!! Colorful flower shapes 🌸🌼
Probiotics are a must, right~?
Get probiotics from cheese AND it smells delicious,,
The powder it produces is actually perfect for adding to their water intake too 💪🏼

reviews.name: 곽****
reviews.content:
요즘 너무 핫한 유산균치즈 간식❣️❣️
저희 애기가 너무 좋아해용❤️ 
간식으로 줘도 너무 잘먹고 사료랑같이줘도 난리나요🥰🥰
치즈 특유의 꼬릿한 냄새 당연히없구용 
먹으면서 가루날림 전혀~ 없어용 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en:
The probiotic cheese treats that are so hot right now! ❣️❣️
My baby absolutely loves them! ❤️
Eats them great as a snack AND goes crazy when I mix them with their regular food 🥰🥰
No weird cheesy smell at all, of course!
Zero powder mess while eating~ ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
뭐예요 이거?!???
너무귀엽고 맛있는데요?
일단..가루가 많이 생겨서 오긴해요ㅜㅜ
근데 애들이 형태가 살아있어요 뚜껑열면 약간 새콤시큼한 냄새가 나지만!
바삭바삭 엄청 잘먹네요~
이거먹으려고 쉬짜내고 왔어요ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en:
What is this?!???
So cute and delicious!
Okay, it does make some powder 😭
But the treats hold their shape! When I open the container there's a slightly tangy smell, but...
They eat them so crunchily!
My pup actually comes running just to get these ㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 현****
reviews.content:
3키로대 강아지가 먹기에 트릿 크기가 아주 적당해요!

모양도 뾰족한곳 없이 둥글둥글해서 급여할때 걱정이 없고, 프로바이오틱스가 들어있어 유산균 잘 안먹는 아이에게 급여하기에도 좋아요👍🏻

맛있는지 아이들도 너무너무 잘 먹어요!
모양도 색도 예뻐서 우리애기 밥꾸하기에 딱이에요🌸
reviews.content_en:
Perfect treat size for a 3kg dog!
The shape is nicely rounded with no sharp edges, so there's no worry when giving it, and since it has probiotics, it's great for pups that don't usually eat probiotics well 👍🏻
My babies eat it so well!
The shape and colors are so pretty, it's perfect for decorating our baby's food bowl 🌸

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
유산균 치즈 거의 다 먹어서 행사하길래 행사가로 구입~
울 큰딸래미가 올해 14살인데 치아가 거의 다빠졌어요ㅠㅠ
근데 요 유산균치즈는 너무 잘먹기도 하고 무엇보다 영양간식이라 더 좋은거 같아요~^^
reviews.content_en:
We were almost out of the probiotic cheese treats, and they had a sale so I bought it on sale~
My oldest is 14 this year and has lost almost all her teeth 😭
But this probiotic cheese is so easy to eat and most importantly, it's a nutritious treat so I love it~^^

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 동글동글 트릿형태 유산균이라 먹기 편하고 색감도 기여워요🩷💚 유당 걱정없어서 안심하고 먹일수 있을것 같아요🌸
reviews.content_en: The round treat-shaped probiotics are easy to eat and the colors are so cute 🩷💚 No worry about lactose, so I can feed it with peace of mind 🌸

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 사실 밥꾸하려고 샀는데 너무 귀엽구.. 유산균 트릿으로 주기에 또 간편하구 다 먹으면 다른 맛도 사야겟어요🤍
reviews.content_en: I actually bought it as a rice bowl topper but it's so adorable... plus it's convenient to give as a probiotic treat and once it's gone I'll have to get other flavors 🤍

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content:
치즈 좋아하는 울 강아지
냄새 맡자마자 바로 달라구 꼬리 흔들고 난리났어요!
기호성 최고⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
물간식으로 줘도 너무 잘 먹고, 음수량 채우기도 좋아요!
장 건강을 위해 밥에 토핑으로도 올려주니
밥도 더 잘먹고, 밥꾸하기에도 너무 예뻐요 💙
reviews.content_en:
My pup who loves cheese!
The moment they smelled it, their tail started wagging and they went crazy asking for it!
Taste preference top tier ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Eats it great even as a water treat and is great for increasing water intake too!
I even sprinkle it on their food for gut health and they eat their food better, plus it looks so pretty on the rice bowl 💙

reviews.name: 배****
reviews.content:
배송오자마자 먹여봤는데 넘 잘먹어요!
색도 예쁘고 모양도 귀여워서 밥꾸템으로 완전 취저!!
reviews.content_en:
I gave it to them right after it arrived and they loved it!
The colors are pretty and the shape is cute, so it's perfect as a rice bowl topper!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
딸기 블루베리 치즈 환장하는 우리집 강아지 맞춤간식같아요😆
야채안먹는 강아지도 맛있게 줄수있고 유산균까지 들어있어서 맘에 쏙드는 건강간식!!🫶🏻
reviews.content_en:
Strawberry, blueberry, cheese—it's like a custom treat for my dog who's obsessed with these! 😆
Perfect for pups that won't eat vegetables, and it has probiotics too, so it's a health treat I'm totally happy with!! 🫶🏻

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
유산균을 영양제로 먹이고 있지만 맛있게 간식처럼 먹을 수 있는걸로 구매해보았어요!!! ㅎㅎ
단단하지않고 씹으면 으스러지는 식감인데 입작은 치와와한테고 크기 딱이에요 :)
다음번에 다른맛 구매해보려구용
reviews.content_en:
I'm giving my dog probiotics as a supplement but wanted to find something delicious they could eat like a treat! ㅎㅎ
It's not hard and crumbles when chewed, which is perfect size for my small Chihuahua :)
I'm planning to try other flavors next time!

reviews.name: 공****
reviews.content:
블루베리랑 치즈맛 먼저 급여했는데 잘 먹길래 이번엔 다른 맛으로 구매해봤어요!
색감이 넘 귀여워요~ 밥 꾸미기에도 딱 좋아요
이것도 부디 잘 먹어주길 🤤
reviews.content_en:
Fed the blueberry and cheese flavor first and they ate it well, so this time I bought a different flavor!
The colors are so cute~ Perfect for decorating their rice too
Hoping they eat this well too 🤤

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
좋은 이벤트 통해 처음 사먹였는데 너무 잘먹어요!
평소에 유산균을 잘 안 챙겨줬는데(건강한 응가를 잘 해서!) 이렇게 간식으로 소소하게 챙겨주니 좋은 것 같습니다 :)
간식이랑 같이 찍은 사진은 아쉽게도 없지만 ㅠㅠ
간식으로 유인하면서 찍은 사진이라도..!
reviews.content_en:
I tried it for the first time through a nice event and they eat it so well!
I usually don't give probiotics (since their poop is healthy!), but giving it casually as a treat like this seems beneficial :)
Unfortunately don't have a photo taken with the treats 😭
But here's a photo taken while using the treat as bait..!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
리틀코티지 덕분에 밥꾸라는 걸 처음 해봤습니다!
기호성 넘 좋아요!! 다른건 남겼는데,,ㅠ 리틀코티지는 쏙 빼먹었더라구용ㅎㅎ 몸에도 좋고 맛도 좋고 모양도 귀엽고! 최고!︎︎︎︎♥︎
reviews.content_en:
Thanks to Little Cottage, I decorated a rice bowl for the first time!
Superior taste preference!! They left other things, but would completely gobble up the Little Cottage ㅎㅎ Good for their body, tasty, adorable shape! The best! ♥︎

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content:
치즈 좋아해서 구매해봤는데 맛있는지 잘 먹네요~
아침에 유산균을 먹인 후, 저녁에 한개 주고 있어요
reviews.content_en:
Bought it because they like cheese and they eat it well~
I give them probiotics in the morning and one treat in the evening

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
유산균 치즈가 있길래 간식보다 낫지않을까 싶어서~~
일단 기호성은 환장합니다ㅋㅋ 통만 들어도 뺑글뺑글돌아요ㅋㅋ처음엔 낯가리더니 그 다음부턴 치즈에 집착ㅋㅋ
간식대용으로 먹이는데 몸에도 좋다고하니 일석이조에용ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en:
Since there was a probiotic cheese, I thought it might be better than just a regular treat~~
First of all, the taste preference is absolutely crazy ㅋㅋ They spin in circles just from hearing the container ㅋㅋ They were picky at first but after that they became obsessed with the cheese ㅋㅋ
I give it as a treat substitute and since it's good for their body too, it's two birds with one stone! ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 항상 급여하고있는건데 세일하길래 쟁여두어요! 잘먹이겠습니다 넘귀여워요 흐흐 애기가 잘먹기도하구요!
reviews.content_en: I'm always giving it to them and they had a sale so I stocked up! Will feed it well, it's so cute hehe and my baby eats it well too!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
밥꾸할때 하나만 올려도 포인트 주기 너무 좋아요!
가루로 뿌셔서 물 간식으로 줘도 너무 잘 먹어요
양도 많아서 가성비도 좋습니다
reviews.content_en:
Just putting one on top when decorating the rice bowl is such a nice touch!
I can even crush it into powder and give it as a water treat and they eat it so well!
Great quantity too, so great value for money!
